message.content: @startuml skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam packageStyle rectangle skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0 skinparam noteBorderColor #999999 class FEDLCookChecker { TMultiMap ImportToImportingPackage TSet Exports TMultiMap NodePrereqs -- AddImport() AddExport() AddArc() } class FEDLNodeID { TArray ObjectPath -- GetTypeHash() } note right of FEDLNodeID ObjectPath 示例: Hash算法: 基于FName的Hash，注意Hash的末位是序列化标记 DepIsSerialize end note class FUObjectThreadContext { TArray InitializerStack TRefCountPtr SerializeContext } class FObjectInitializer class FUObjectSerializeContext { TArray ObjectsLoad TArray AttachedLinkers } note top of FUObjectSerializeContext 这个结构体缓存多个UObject序列化信息 end note package "CookUtils" as CookUtils #C8FF66 { class FPackageTracker class CookRequests } FEDLNodeID --> FEDLCookChecker FObjectInitializer "1:*" --> FUObjectThreadContext FUObjectSerializeContext "1:1" --> FUObjectThreadContext CookRequests --> FPackageTracker @enduml
